Menu

Best Seafood in San Diego

 

Teppanyaki
Let our teppan chefs dazzle you with their samurai-like swordsmanship as they skillfully slice, dice, juggle, while preparing delicious entrees on a sizzling teppanyaki grill in front of you.

Seafood
Our huge selection of seafood such as Lobster, Snow Crab Legs, Oyster, Jumbo Shrimp, Mussel, Tuna, Scallop, Salmon, Crawfish, Clam, Squid and more seasonal choices throughout the year.

Sushi
Over 30 kinds of Nigiri, Temaki, Sashimi and special roll are made fresh daily in front of you by our skillful sushi chefs using only the freshest ingredients.

Salad and fruit
Garden Salad, Fusion Salad, Traditional Salads and fresh seasonal fruits are prepared daily. No matter you are vegetarian or green lover, you will find your lovely healthy.

Grill
Best quality meats such as chicken, poultry, rib, sausage, lamb and more are grilled daily. Delight yourself with the best quality meat.

Hot dish
Our awarded winning chefs using hot sizzling wok to prepare delicious hot dishes for you ranging from East to West.

Dessert
Freshly baked dessert such as Crème Brûlée, Creme Puff, Cheesecake, cookies and much more! 44 inch tall chocolate fondue tower and large selection of Italian Gelato!!

COME WITH CURIOSITY…

LEAVE WITH HAPPINESS!

Read Evelyn T.'s review of 100s Seafood Grill Buffet on Yelp
 
ABOUT 100S

We are an ALL-YOU-CAN-EAT Restaurant Serving San Diego's Finest Seafood & Grill. Centrally Located, Easy To Get To.
